add.title: Add New Stream
add.description: Enter the channel name or url to add a new stream to your multistream.
add.favoritesDescription: Favorite channels that are currently streaming

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Get alerts when favorites go live

auth.title: Accounts
auth.authorizeBrowser: Please authorize the app in your browser.
auth.manualLink: If it didn't open automatically, click the link below.

help.title: Help
help.description: Need assistance or want to review features?

backup.title: Data & Backup
backup.description: Export or import your complete configuration
backup.importConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to import this configuration? This will completely replace your current streams, favorites, recents, and preferences.

transcription.title: Live Transcription
transcription.description: Real-time captions generated using local machine learning.
transcription.macosWarning: Audio capture is unsupported on macOS without BlackHole virtual driver.
transcription.modelTiny: Fastest inference, lower accuracy, more hallucinations.
transcription.modelBase: Recommended. Best balance of speed and quality. Suitable for most systems.
transcription.modelSmall: Highest accuracy, higher CPU usage, may be slow on older processors.
transcription.chunkDurationHintLow: Lower values show captions faster but may use more CPU.
transcription.chunkDurationHintHigh: Higher values reduce processing pressure but increase delay.

share.title: Share Streams
share.description: Share your streams with your friends.

import.title: Import Streams
import.description: Paste a share link to import streams.

empty.title: No streams selected
empty.description: Start by adding your favorite channels to watch simultaneously.

chat.selectPrompt: Select a stream to view chat.
chat.noStreamsHint: Add a stream to view chat.

transcript.emptyStateHint: Enable Live Transcription to start generating captions.

unified.connectHint: Sign in to see messages from all Twitch channels in your grid in a single feed.
unified.noStreamsHint: Add a stream to see messages here.

auth.expired: The authorization code has expired. Please try again.
auth.step2: 2. Enter this code to link your account

unified.warningTwitchLoginToMerge: Connect your Twitch account to include Twitch chats in Unified Chat.
unified.warningTwitchLogin: Connect your Twitch account to enable Unified Chat.

chat.loginPromptTwitch: Connect your Twitch account to send messages in this channel.
chat.loginPromptKick: Connect your Kick account to send messages in this channel.

codecs.missing: Missing media codecs detected. Please install your system codecs (e.g., ubuntu-restricted-extras or gstreamer-plugins) to watch streams.

step1.title: Add Streams
step1.description: Click the '+' button in the sidebar or press the {key} key to add a Twitch, Kick, or YouTube stream.

step2.title: Select Chat
step2.description: Choose which stream chat is visible in the sidebar using the dropdown at the top, or press keys {keys} to switch instantly.

step3.title: Twitch Chat
step3.description: Chat directly in the app! Log in with Twitch to send messages in individual chats, or read messages from all your streams at once using the unified chat.

step4.title: Stream Suggestions by Category
step4.description: Filter suggested streams by category using the chips at the top. Click any chip to instantly load more live streams from Twitch and Kick for that category, in the background.
step4.caption: Streams from both platforms load automatically and stay cached as you browse.

step5.title: Live Transcription
step5.description: Watch streams with real-time captions generated directly on your computer.
step5.note: Everything runs locally on your computer. Performance depends on your CPU and the selected model.

step6.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
step6.description: Use these quick shortcuts to control your streams and chats efficiently:

webBanner.title: Multistream runs better on the desktop app.
